text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I catch sight of Symboli<n>Rudolf and
Narita Brian coaching<n>some younger students
down at the<n>track.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...That is the long and short of it. I<n>would like each
of you to do your<n>best to maintain the form I've
just<n>taught you and achieve the full<n>potential of
your leg strength.

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Do I really need to be here?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... My textbook approach is<n>boring you to
death, I'm sure.<n>However, this is where you
come in.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Brian here will act as your coach. Do<n>your best,
everyone.

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text: Yes ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hey. You do know that I don't know<n>anything
about coaching, right?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that is perfectly all right. I would<n>like you to
do it in your own way.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Fine. But I'm not responsible for<n>what happens.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you lot... Just start out by<n>running. At full
speed.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Huh—I mean—okay! Is there anything<n>we should
keep in mind?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Forget about theory. I only want you<n>to think
about one thing—don't show<n>me a half-assed
run.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Eek! R-roger that!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph. I don't know the meaning of<n>going easy.
Got that, Rudolf?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Raaargh!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what the?! Brian's comin' at us<n>like a bat
out of hell!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong?! Run! Give it<n>everything you got!
It's do-or-die!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Eek! R-run away!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The students scramble away from<n>Narita Brian,
but to no avail. She runs<n>them down with
ferocious speed,<n>overtaking them like a predator
swallowing its prey.

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Groan...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Tch. I knew this would happen.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Not to worry. It's quite all right.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, everyone. By a show of<n>hands, how
many of you ran<n>according to the theory I
explained<n>earlier?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Precisely. Of course you couldn't. A<n>real race is
utter pandemonium—a<n>torrent of animosity. In
such a<n>circumstance, one would be
hard-pressed to put theory into<n>practice.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In order for our labors to bear fruit,<n>we must first
find the fighting spirit<n>within ourselves and be
resolute<n>even in the face of adversity.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Our fighting spirit? You mean like what<n>Brian just
showed us?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Just so. I had Brian kindly perform a
demonstration so you could all<n>understand how
important that is<n>first-hand within the confines of
training.

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text: Wow! Thank you, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph. Put it to good use.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
For crying out loud... Looks like you<n>had this all
planned out from the<n>beginning. And the rest of
us are just<n>dancing on your strings.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm afraid I have no idea what<n>you mean. I
merely wished to teach<n>them something of the
highest<n>importance. In other words...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You have to get their hearts racing to<n>get their
hearts in the race!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I'm outta here.
